Founded in 1992 in the Sifang District of Qingdao (now merged into Shibei District), its historical name and current identity explicitly point to the specialized machining of 'flywheels and ring gears' for internal combustion engines. Despite this specific namesake, its recovered generic business scope ('processing auto/mechanical parts, wholesale steel') and micro-capitalization of 500,000 RMB indicate a severe lack of modern industrial capacity. Critically, the corrected workforce data reveals only 2 insured employees (2024). Given the heavy machinery (lathes, gear hobbing machines) required to manufacture engine flywheels and ring gears, a 2-person team confirms the complete cessation of physical manufacturing. It operates today merely as a dormant shell or a micro steel/parts trading broker.
